title: Retool App
description: A Retool application built in the visual editor, connecting to databases and APIs.

id.description: The unique identifier for the app.

description.description: A description of the application's purpose.

folderId.description: The identifier of the folder containing this app.

createdBy.description: The email of the user who created the app.

resources.description: Resource identifiers used by this app.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the app was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the app was last updated.
